response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform development; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief, non-dominant C++ exposure in early roles, and no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Proven mentorship and workshop leadership in testing and dev practices
Active open-source contributions and technical communication skills
concerns: No demonstrated 8+ years of C++ programming as required
Lacks experience in cloud compute platforms, distributed systems, or hardware architecture
No evidence of technical leadership in cloud or DevOps engineering teams
